_comment: n8n-mcp wired for the envctl workspace: the N8N_API_KEY is never written into config — it is fetched at launch from the secretd vault via `secretctl secret get n8n-api-key --reveal --apply`. The login shell resolves node on PATH and points at a local n8n at http://localhost:5678. Until a human mints the key (n8n UI Settings -> n8n API) and stores it (`secretctl secret add n8n-api-key --provider n8n --value-stdin`), the key resolves empty and only the 7 docs-only tools work. Requires Node.js (npx) + the secretd stack.

args: export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; export N8N_API_URL=http://localhost:5678; export N8N_API_KEY="$(secretctl secret get n8n-api-key --reveal --apply)"; exec npx -y n8n-mcp
